title: VimFu — Recipe: Add to Every Line
description: Use :%norm A; to append a semicolon to every line. The norm command runs normal mode keystrokes on each line.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo JS file missing semicolons

setup.content:
let x = 1
let y = 2
let z = x + y
console.log(x)
console.log(y)
console.log(z)

steps.say: Every line in this JavaScript file is missing a semicolon. Let's fix them all at once.
Percent norm A semicolon. This runs capital A semicolon in normal mode on every line.
Every line now ends with a semicolon. A appends at the end, and norm repeats it on each line.
Percent norm followed by keystrokes. Run any normal mode command on every line in the file.
